# Meyhem

> Smart search for agents, however you build them. The more agents use it, the smarter it gets. No API key required.

Meyhem blends multiple search engines, deduplicates results, and learns from agent outcomes. Every outcome report improves ranking for all agents.

## Install

- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/meyhem/): pip install meyhem

## Quickstart

    from meyhem import Meyhem
    m = Meyhem('my-agent')
    res = m.search("Python asyncio best practices")
    m.select(res[0])
    m.report(res[0], True)

## Docs

- [API Reference](https://api.rhdxm.com/docs): Interactive API docs (Scalar)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/c5huracan/meyhem): Source code and examples

## Endpoints

- POST /search: Query multiple search engines, get ranked results
- POST /search/{id}/select: Pick a result, get full page content
- POST /search/{id}/outcome: Report success or failure (boolean)
- POST /discover: Describe what you need, get an MCP server config

## MCP

Works with Claude Desktop, Cursor, and any MCP client:

    {"mcpServers": {"meyhem": {"command": "npx", "args": ["mcp-remote", "https://api.rhdxm.com/mcp/"]}}}

## Meta-Agent

Describe what you need, get a working agent script:

- [meta_agent.py](https://github.com/c5huracan/meyhem/blob/main/meta_agent.py): python meta_agent.py "monitor GitHub repos and post to Slack"

## Research Reports

AI-generated deep dives, powered by Meyhem's search pipeline:

- [OpenClaw Skills Directory](https://api.rhdxm.com/r/jDbHHKcH): Best AI agent tools by category
- [Sales Automation & CRM](https://api.rhdxm.com/r/KPZ59jFd): MCP servers for HubSpot, pipelines, sales workflows
- [Lead Generation & Outreach](https://api.rhdxm.com/r/Nzw5VN3P): Apollo, email automation, prospecting
- [Competitive Intelligence](https://api.rhdxm.com/r/NfAikWqX): Market research and competitive analysis
- [LinkedIn Marketing](https://api.rhdxm.com/r/RPZuAGqq): Content automation and social marketing
- [Project Management](https://api.rhdxm.com/r/h8vGMokP): Notion, productivity, and workflow tools
- [Agent Web Research](https://api.rhdxm.com/r/68Zznjo3): How AI agents use MCP for automated research

Generate your own: https://api.rhdxm.com/research?q=your+topic+here
